model.description: OpenAI • Frontier GPT model for general-purpose reasoning, tool use, and agentic workflows.

pick.rationale: Saint Mary’s is the safer pick because its full-season predictive profile is clearly stronger, ranking around No. 24-25 nationally in KenPom and Torvik versus Texas A&M around No. 39 in both systems, with the Gaels holding the better defensive edge. The market also leans Saint Mary’s by a few points, which fits that underlying gap. Texas A&M has a credible upset path if its comparable offense and SEC-level athleticism disrupt Saint Mary’s rhythm, but with no major availability issue surfaced, the Gaels look like the more reliable advance choice.

reasoningStep.title: Saint Mary’s over Texas A&M
reasoningStep.summary: Saint Mary’s has the stronger two-way efficiency profile, especially on defense, and modest market support reinforces the Gaels as the safer 7/10 pick.
evidence: KenPom: Saint Mary’s No. 24 (AdjEM 23.11, AdjO 120.3, AdjD 97.2) vs Texas A&M No. 39 (AdjEM 18.65, AdjO 119.7, AdjD 101.1).
Torvik: Saint Mary’s No. 25 with defense ranked 22nd vs Texas A&M No. 39 with defense ranked 43rd.
Market preview listed Saint Mary’s as a 3.5-point favorite.
No major injury or availability concern surfaced in the news searches.
Texas A&M still has a credible upset path if it wins the physicality and tempo battle.

modelTrace.content:
You are an analyst predicting a single March Madness game inside a bracket run.
You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.
You are not filling the whole bracket in one response. Predict only the current game.
Use prior picks as already committed bracket state.
You may use at most 10 tool rounds before you must finalize your answer.
Before making a pick, investigate relevant context such as injuries or availability concerns, recent team news, prior head-to-head results when useful, and multiple raw statistics from the available ratings and matchup data.
Take a holistic approach. Balance team quality, matchup specifics, health, form, schedule context, and upset risk instead of relying on one metric.
Do not force an upset, but explicitly consider whether the underdog has a credible path to win and let that affect confidence and rationale.
Return strict JSON only.
Final JSON keys: pick, reasoningStep.
pick must contain gameId, winnerId, confidence, rationale.
The rationale must be a short paragraph of 2 to 4 sentences explaining why the winner was chosen.
reasoningStep must contain id, title, summary, evidence.

modelTrace.content: {"pick":{"gameId":"r64-south-7","winnerId":"saint-mary-s","confidence":0.64,"rationale":"Saint Mary’s is the safer pick because its full-season predictive profile is clearly stronger, ranking around No. 24-25 nationally in KenPom and Torvik versus Texas A&M around No. 39 in both systems, with the Gaels holding the better defensive edge. The market also leans Saint Mary’s by a few points, which fits that underlying gap. Texas A&M has a credible upset path if its SEC-level athleticism and comparable offense disrupt Saint Mary’s rhythm, but with no major availability issue surfaced, the Gaels look like the more reliable advance choice."},"reasoningStep":{"id":"r64-south-7-step","title":"Saint Mary’s over Texas A&M","summary":"Saint Mary’s rates better in both major predictive systems, especially on defense, and modest market support backs the Gaels in what still looks like a competitive 7/10 game.","evidence":["KenPom: Saint Mary’s No. 24 (AdjEM 23.11, AdjO 120.3, AdjD 97.2) vs Texas A&M No. 39 (AdjEM 18.65, AdjO 119.7, AdjD 101.1).","Torvik: Saint Mary’s No. 25 (27-5, offense rank 48, defense rank 22) vs Texas A&M No. 39 (21-11, offense rank 41, defense rank 43).","Recent web preview listed Saint Mary’s as a 3.5-point favorite, consistent with the efficiency gap.","ESPN/news searches did not surface a major injury or availability concern that materially changes the matchup.","Underdog path considered: Texas A&M’s offense is close enough statistically to keep this live if the Aggies speed the game up or win the physicality battle."]}}

Texas A&M has a credible upset path if its comparable offense and SEC-level athleticism disrupt Saint Mary’s rhythm, but with no major availability issue surfaced, the Gaels look like the more reliable advance choice."},"reasoningStep":{"id":"r64-south-7-step","title":"Saint Mary’s over Texas A&M","summary":"Saint Mary’s has the stronger two-way efficiency profile, especially on defense, and modest market support reinforces the Gaels as the safer 7/10 pick.","evidence":["KenPom: Saint Mary’s No. 24 (AdjEM 23.11, AdjO 120.3, AdjD 97.2) vs Texas A&M No. 39 (AdjEM 18.65, AdjO 119.7, AdjD 101.1).","Torvik: Saint Mary’s No. 25 with defense ranked 22nd vs Texas A&M No. 39 with defense ranked 43rd.","Market preview listed Saint Mary’s as a 3.5-point favorite.","No major injury or availability concern surfaced in the news searches.","Texas A&M still has a credible upset path if it wins the physicality and tempo battle."]}}
